acquisition method: Data-dependent acquisition (DDA) analyses revealed the presence of 119 unique peptides
instrument: coupled to a Q-Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer
ionization type: fitted with a heated-electrospray ionization (HESI) source
labeling: fully 15N-labeled nucleoprotein was used as stable isotope-labeled (SIL) internal standard
reduction reagent: 5 mM DTT in 50 mM TEAB pH 8.5
reduction concentration: 5 mM DTT in 50 mM TEAB pH 8.5
